requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — Household Refrigerating Appliances (O'zDSt / IEC 60335-2-24)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——家用制冷器具（O'zDSt / IEC 60335-2-24）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——家用製冷器具（O'zDSt / IEC 60335-2-24）

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances placed on the Uzbekistan market must demonstrate electrical safety against the national standard adopting IEC 60335-2-24 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Part 2-24: Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers), read together with the national adoption of IEC 60335-1 general requirements. Uzbekistan operates a national regulatory regime (it is NOT an EAEU member), so conformity is assessed under O'zDSt standards administered by O'zStandart (the Uzbek Agency for Technical Regulation), which adopt IEC and legacy GOST standards. Key safety requirements mirror IEC 60335-2-24: protection against electric shock, insulation resistance and dielectric strength, thermal cut-outs, creepage and clearance distances, earthing continuity, mechanical strength, and appliance markings. The Uzbek grid is 220/380 V at 50 Hz, which matches China's 220/380 V 50 Hz nominal voltage and frequency, so no electrical re-rating or power-supply redesign is required for Chinese-origin appliances on the voltage/frequency basis.
summary.zh: 投放乌兹别克斯坦市场的家用制冷器具须依据采用IEC 60335-2-24的国家标准（家用和类似用途电器的安全——第2-24部分：制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求）证明电气安全，并结合采用IEC 60335-1通用要求的国家标准一并使用。乌兹别克斯坦实行国家监管制度（非欧亚经济联盟成员），故合格评定依据由O'zStandart（乌兹别克技术法规局）管理的O'zDSt标准进行，该等标准采用IEC及沿用的GOST标准。核心安全要求与IEC 60335-2-24一致：防触电保护、绝缘电阻与介电强度、热断路器、爬电距离与电气间隙、接地连续性、机械强度及器具标识。乌兹别克电网为220/380 V、50 Hz，与中国220/380 V 50 Hz额定电压和频率一致，故中国原产器具在电压/频率方面无需重新定额或电源重新设计。
summary.zht: 投放烏茲別克市場的家用製冷器具須依據採用IEC 60335-2-24的國家標準（家用和類似用途電器的安全——第2-24部分：製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求）證明電氣安全，並結合採用IEC 60335-1通用要求的國家標準一併使用。烏茲別克實行國家監管制度（非歐亞經濟聯盟成員），故合格評定依據由O'zStandart（烏茲別克技術法規局）管理的O'zDSt標準進行，該等標準採用IEC及沿用的GOST標準。核心安全要求與IEC 60335-2-24一致：防觸電保護、絕緣電阻與介電強度、熱斷路器、爬電距離與電氣間隙、接地連續性、機械強度及器具標識。烏茲別克電網為220/380 V、50 Hz，與中國220/380 V 50 Hz額定電壓和頻率一致，故中國原產器具在電壓/頻率方面無需重新定額或電源重新設計。

standards_or_laws: O'zDSt adoption of IEC 60335-2-24 — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers (administered by O'zStandart)
O'zDSt adoption of IEC 60335-1 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — General requirements (read in conjunction with the Part 2-24 adoption)
Uzbekistan Law on Technical Regulation / Law on Certification of Products and Services — national conformity-assessment framework administered by O'zStandart

summary.en: China's mandatory safety standard for household refrigerating appliances is GB 4706.13-2014 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers), technically derived from IEC 60335-2-24:2010 with Chinese national deviations, read together with GB 4706.1 (general requirements). GB 4706.13 is mandatory and enforced by SAMR under the China Compulsory Certification (CCC) regime; products must be CCC-certified by a CNCA-designated certification body before sale in China. Because both China and Uzbekistan ultimately base their household-appliance safety standards on the IEC 60335-2-24 family, the underlying technical content is closely aligned; however, a Chinese CCC certificate against GB 4706.13 is not itself a recognised Uzbek certificate of conformity.
summary.zh: 中国家用制冷器具的强制性安全标准为GB 4706.13-2014（家用和类似用途电器的安全——制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求），技术上源自IEC 60335-2-24:2010并含中国国家偏差，须与GB 4706.1（通用要求）结合使用。GB 4706.13为强制性标准，由市场监管总局（SAMR）通过中国强制认证（CCC）制度执行；产品须经CNCA指定认证机构完成CCC认证方可在中国销售。由于中国与乌兹别克斯坦的家用器具安全标准最终均以IEC 60335-2-24系列为基础，底层技术内容高度一致；但依据GB 4706.13取得的中国CCC证书本身并非乌方承认的合格证书。
summary.zht: 中國家用製冷器具的強制性安全標準為GB 4706.13-2014（家用和類似用途電器的安全——製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求），技術上源自IEC 60335-2-24:2010並含中國國家偏差，須與GB 4706.1（通用要求）結合使用。GB 4706.13為強制性標準，由市場監管總局（SAMR）通過中國強制認證（CCC）制度執行；產品須經CNCA指定認證機構完成CCC認證方可在中國銷售。由於中國與烏茲別克的家用器具安全標準最終均以IEC 60335-2-24系列為基礎，底層技術內容高度一致；但依據GB 4706.13取得的中國CCC證書本身並非烏方承認的合格證書。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers (mandatory; derived from IEC 60335-2-24:2010 with national deviations; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB 4706.1-2005 — General requirements (read in conjunction with GB 4706.13)

gap.en: The gap is largely procedural rather than technical, because both regimes share the IEC 60335-2-24 basis and the 220/380 V 50 Hz supply is identical: (1) A Chinese CCC certificate / GB 4706.13 test report is not a recognised Uzbek conformity document — a certificate or declaration of conformity must be obtained through O'zStandart or an accredited Uzbek conformity-assessment body referencing the relevant O'zDSt/IEC 60335-2-24 adoption. (2) IEC test reports issued under the IECEE CB Scheme (IEC 60335-2-24 basis) are often accepted as supporting evidence by the Uzbek body, which can substantially reduce or avoid re-testing — manufacturers should confirm CB report acceptance and any Uzbek national-deviation coverage with the conformity-assessment body. (3) Because the voltage and frequency genuinely match China, NO power-supply redesign, plug re-rating, or thermal re-characterisation for a different mains voltage is needed — only documentary conformity (certificate/declaration, markings, and instructions in the required language) must be established. (4) National deviations embedded in GB 4706.13 should be reviewed against the Uzbek-adopted IEC text to confirm no clause is missed.
gap.zh: 由于两套制度均以IEC 60335-2-24为基础且220/380 V 50 Hz供电完全相同，差距主要是程序性而非技术性：（1）中国CCC证书/GB 4706.13检测报告并非乌方承认的合格文件——须通过O'zStandart或乌方认可的合格评定机构，依据相关O'zDSt/IEC 60335-2-24采用标准取得合格证书或声明。（2）依据IECEE CB体系出具的IEC检测报告（基于IEC 60335-2-24）通常被乌方机构接受作为支撑证据，可大幅减少甚至免除重新检测——制造商应向合格评定机构确认CB报告的接受情况及乌方国家偏差的覆盖范围。（3）由于电压和频率与中国真实匹配，无需进行电源重新设计、插头重新定额或针对不同电网电压的热特性重新表征——仅须建立文件合规（证书/声明、标识及所需语言的使用说明书）。（4）应将GB 4706.13中的国家偏差与乌方采用的IEC文本进行比对，确认无遗漏条款。
gap.zht: 由於兩套制度均以IEC 60335-2-24為基礎且220/380 V 50 Hz供電完全相同，差距主要是程序性而非技術性：（1）中國CCC證書/GB 4706.13檢測報告並非烏方承認的合格文件——須通過O'zStandart或烏方認可的合格評定機構，依據相關O'zDSt/IEC 60335-2-24採用標準取得合格證書或聲明。（2）依據IECEE CB體系出具的IEC檢測報告（基於IEC 60335-2-24）通常被烏方機構接受作為支撐證據，可大幅減少甚至免除重新檢測——製造商應向合格評定機構確認CB報告的接受情況及烏方國家偏差的覆蓋範圍。（3）由於電壓和頻率與中國真實匹配，無需進行電源重新設計、插頭重新定額或針對不同電網電壓的熱特性重新表徵——僅須建立文件合規（證書/聲明、標識及所需語言的使用說明書）。（4）應將GB 4706.13中的國家偏差與烏方採用的IEC文本進行比對，確認無遺漏條款。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — a certificate or declaration of conformity referencing the O'zDSt/IEC 60335-2-24 adoption must be obtained through O'zStandart or an accredited Uzbek conformity-assessment body before customs clearance and market placement
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required under GB 4706.13-2014 before sale in China; administered by SAMR/CNCA

source.publisher: O'zStandart — Uzbek Agency for Technical Regulation

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Electrical safety for Uzbekistan is assessed against the O'zDSt adoption of IEC 60335-2-24 under the national (non-EAEU) regime. Because the 220/380 V 50 Hz supply matches China, no power-supply redesign is needed — but a Chinese CCC certificate does not substitute for an Uzbek conformity certificate/declaration. IECEE CB Scheme reports (IEC 60335-2-24 basis) are often accepted as supporting evidence; confirm acceptance and national-deviation coverage with the conformity-assessment body.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 乌兹别克斯坦的电气安全依据O'zDSt采用的IEC 60335-2-24在国家（非欧亚经济联盟）制度下评定。由于220/380 V 50 Hz供电与中国一致，无需电源重新设计——但中国CCC证书不能替代乌方合格证书/声明。IECEE CB体系报告（基于IEC 60335-2-24）通常被接受作为支撑证据；请向合格评定机构确认接受情况及国家偏差覆盖范围。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 烏茲別克的電氣安全依據O'zDSt採用的IEC 60335-2-24在國家（非歐亞經濟聯盟）制度下評定。由於220/380 V 50 Hz供電與中國一致，無需電源重新設計——但中國CCC證書不能替代烏方合格證書/聲明。IECEE CB體系報告（基於IEC 60335-2-24）通常被接受作為支撐證據；請向合格評定機構確認接受情況及國家偏差覆蓋範圍。
